description_long: This house is a large, modern residential building surrounded by a dense arrangement of mature trees and landscaping, providing privacy and a natural aesthetic. The structure features a flat roof and a geometric, rectilinear design with clean lines and a neutral color palette. The front approach includes a paved driveway leading to a central entrance, flanked by a circular fountain and formal garden beds. Multiple outdoor living spaces, including patios and a visible swimming pool, are integrated into the property, enhancing its luxury appeal. Large windows are distributed across the facade, allowing for ample natural light and views of the surrounding greenery. The property is bordered by a road, indicating easy access and an urban or suburban context.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, surrounded by trees, landscaped gardens, and a swimming pool, set adjacent to a road.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, circular fountain, formal landscaping, and the road in front.
description_view_1: Rear/side view highlighting the swimming pool, additional patios, and dense tree coverage.
description_view_2: Back view with a clear look at the pool area, rear facade, and surrounding trees, with the road behind.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the extensive tree coverage, side patios, and the road running along the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with wide steps, a prominent door, landscaped approach, and a circular fountain.
